name: Marinated Chicken Drumettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken in a saucepan.
2. Bring to boil and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Cool the mixture.
4. Pour the sauce over the chicken and cover; refrigerate overnight.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Place chicken on greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake uncovered for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, basting frequently.
8. Switch pans while cooking to ensure even cooking.
